name: Rhythm Guide
description: Minimal rhythm-game style input guide for Geometry Dash macros.

enabled.name: Enable Rhythm Guide
enabled.description: Master switch for all overlay visuals.

macro-fps.name: Macro FPS
macro-fps.description: Frame rate used to convert macro frames to seconds.

input-window-ms.name: Judgement Window, ms
input-window-ms.description: Maximum deviation to match your input to a macro input.

in-window-ms.name: In Window, ms
in-window-ms.description: If deviation is within this value, the mod shows 'In'.

show-ms-feedback.name: Show MS Feedback
show-ms-feedback.description: Show timing deviation near the player.

show-in-text.name: Show 'In'
show-in-text.description: Show 'In' instead of +0ms when input is accurate.

strict-player-match.name: Strict Player Match
strict-player-match.description: Only match P1 inputs with P1 macro inputs and P2 with P2.

strict-button-match.name: Strict Button Match
strict-button-match.description: Only match the exact button id from the macro.

gd-bool-true-is-p1.name: GD bool true = P1
gd-bool-true-is-p1.description: Compatibility toggle for PlayLayer input bool mapping.

cbf-subframe-clock.name: CBF Sub-frame Clock
cbf-subframe-clock.description: Use wall-clock offset after last physics update for more precise CBF-style input timing.

lookahead-ms.name: Line Lookahead, ms
lookahead-ms.description: How early guide lines appear before the ideal input.

past-visible-ms.name: Past Visibility, ms
past-visible-ms.description: How long lines remain after passing the hit position.

line-height-percent.name: Line Height %
line-height-percent.description: Vertical line height relative to screen height.

show-event-labels.name: Show Event Labels
show-event-labels.description: Show P1/P2 and press/release label above guide lines.

attach-icon-until-release.name: Attach Icon Until Release
attach-icon-until-release.description: White feedback icon stays attached to player until release input.

disable-in-ship.name: Disable Lines In Ship
disable-in-ship.description: Hide rhythm guide lines while player is ship.

disable-in-wave.name: Disable Lines In Wave
disable-in-wave.description: Hide rhythm guide lines while player is wave.

clear-lines-on-ship-wave.name: Clear Lines Immediately On Ship/Wave
clear-lines-on-ship-wave.description: As soon as ship/wave mode starts, all current guide lines disappear.

fallback-scroll-pps.name: Fallback Scroll PPS
fallback-scroll-pps.description: Fallback pixels-per-second for line movement if speed estimation is unavailable.
